infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: EcoLogic needs your location to track your position while clocked in to a job.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: EcoLogic needs background location access to continue tracking your position while the app is minimized during active work sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: EcoLogic needs background location access to continue tracking your position while the app is minimized during active work sessions.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: EcoLogic needs background location to track your position while clocked in.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: EcoLogic needs background location to track your position while clocked in.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: EcoLogic needs your location to track your position while on the job.
